# unifi_country (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi country definition by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 `code` or `name`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a country definition by ISO alpha-2 code.
data "unifi_country" "united_states" {
  code = "US"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `code` (String)
- `name` (String)
